codeReview.summary: The commit cleanly lands the PeerPermissionTag refactor across PeerRow/PeerPolicyChip/PoliciesState/RotateKeyset profile UI, restores PeerRow effective-policy badge semantics expected by the test contract, and adds the missing packageService helper needed by AppStateProvider for create-profile peer permission overrides. Scope is consistent with the feature objective and no blocking correctness or security regressions were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-screen-worker skill text is internally inconsistent with observed handoff semantics around agent-browser omission: it allows skipping agent-browser for data-wiring fixes but also says omission MUST set followedProcedure=false. This worker skipped agent-browser and recorded followedProcedure=true with no deviations.
